factors.detail: 트럼프 대통령이 공개적으로 전쟁이 "4-5주 내"에 끝날 것이라고 발언했습니다.
언론에서 휴전보다 확전을 더 많이 보도하고 있습니다.

factors.factor: 호르무즈 해협 봉쇄 → 국제 경제 압력
factors.detail: 세계 원유의 약 20%가 호르무즈 해협을 통과합니다.

factors.impact: 정권 붕괴 가능성과 내부 혼란 장기화 위험
factors.detail: 최고지도자의 사망으로 정권 내부에 큰 혼란이 발생합니다.
쿠르드 페쉬메르가 부대가 북부 전선을 열었습니다.

factors.impact: 이란의 협상 의지 → 단기 종전 가능성 증가
factors.detail: 이란이 비밀 채널을 통해 협상을 시도했습니다.
이번 전쟁은 걸프전과 매우 유사한 패턴을 보입니다.
실시간 뉴스에서 협상 관련 기사 2건이 감지되었습니다.

factors.impact: 주변국 대규모 연루 → 장기화 위험 높음
미국 내 정치적 지지로 군사작전 지속 가능
factors.detail: 미 상원이 전쟁권한 제한 결의안을 부결시켰습니다.

factors.impact: 이란 포위망 강화 → 조기 항복 가능성
높은 경제 압력 → 빠른 해결 요구 증가
factors.detail: WTI 유가가 $112.06/배럴로 100달러 돌파입니다. 호르무즈 해협 봉쇄와 맞물려 글로벌 에너지 시장에 큰 충격을 주고 있으며, 주요국들의 조기 종전 압력이 강화되고 있습니다.

factors.impact: 안전자산 수요 폭증 → 글로벌 불안 심화
factors.detail: 금 가격이 온스당 $4702.7로 사상 최고 수준입니다. 투자자들이 안전자산으로 대거 이동하고 있으며, 이는 전쟁 장기화에 대한 시장의 우려를 반영합니다.

latest_news.title: Middle East crisis live: one crew member rescued from US fighter jet shot down by Iran as its army claims it downed second US plane
latest_news.snippet: US forces searching for second crew member after jet shot down by armed forces this morning; another US plane reportedly crashed in a separate incident and its pilot was rescuedUS F-15E jet confirmed

latest_news.title: What We Know About the F-15E Strike Eagle Shot Down by Iran
latest_news.snippet: An F-15E Strike Eagle was lost to enemy fire and an A-10 Warthog crashed in the Persian Gulf region on Friday, officials said. A rescue helicopter was also fired upon.

latest_news.title: Iran Shoots Down U.S. Fighter Jet, Setting Off American Search and Rescue
latest_news.snippet: One crew member was rescued. The risky operation to find the second airman came as the United States and Israel struck infrastructure targets in Iran, prompting Iranian retaliation in the Gulf.

latest_news.title: The F-15E Strike Eagle: What to Know
latest_news.snippet: The U.S. military aircraft with a two-person crew was shot down in Iran on Friday.

latest_news.title: Iran’s Defenses Have Been Struck, but They Can Still Fire Missiles and Drones
latest_news.snippet: Iran has sent waves of missiles and drones at Israel and Gulf states in recent weeks and shot down an American fighter jet on Friday.

latest_news.title: US pilot rescued after fighter jet downed over Iran, US media report
latest_news.snippet: A search and rescue mission also came under fire, bringing down another jet over the Persian Gulf.

latest_news.title: Christians in Lebanon observe Good Friday under Israeli attacks
latest_news.snippet: Christians across Lebanon observed Good Friday, praying for peace as Israeli strikes and evacuation orders continue.

latest_news.title: Will force be used to reopen Strait of Hormuz?
latest_news.snippet: Some countries threaten action against Iran's blockade of waterway.

latest_news.title: Survivors of Iran bridge attack recall terror of US-Israeli strike
latest_news.snippet: Survivors of an Israeli-US attack on Iran’s biggest road bridge have spoken of their terror as missiles hit it.

latest_news.title: Iran Is Quickly Repairing Missile Bunkers, U.S. Intelligence Says
latest_news.snippet: Reports cast doubt on how close the United States is to destroying Iran’s missile capability, a key goal in the war.

latest_news.title: US warns its citizens to leave Lebanon citing escalating security risks
latest_news.snippet: The advisory follows recent military developments, including a US jet reportedly being shot down and Israeli strikes on parts of Beirut.

latest_news.title: Two dozen Democrat-led states sue Trump over mail-in ballot limits
latest_news.snippet: Rights groups have raised concerns about Trump's efforts to change election administration before midterms.

latest_news.title: US judge upholds decision to toss subpoenas into Fed Chair Jerome Powell
latest_news.snippet: Judge Boasberg says Trump administration's arguments 'do not come close to convincing Court' of subpoenas' legitimacy.

latest_news.title: More than 20 attacks on Iranian healthcare facilities since March 1: WHO
latest_news.snippet: WHO chief Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus says 'multiple attacks' on Iranian healthcare facilities have been reported.
